{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Kash-Nagh
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kash-Nagh]] is a ten-foot-tall humanoid animal resembling a man crossed with a bear.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
